result.name: Witch’s ladder
result.description: Level: 1d6 + 2 Form: Garland of knotted string, feathers, teeth, and bells Effect: Safely stores one curse for use at a later time. The stored curse may be released and cast only by the person who stored it, or by someone who has received their permission to do so.

sections.name: Witch’s ladder
sections.effect:
Level: 1d6 + 2

Form: Garland of knotted string, feathers, teeth, and bells

Effect: Safely stores one curse for use at a later time. The stored curse may be released and cast only by the person who stored it, or by someone who has received their permission to do so.
